text: The tilt of my perspective and the subtle glow from within the glass room create an alien, almost dreamlike disquiet in this place. The blue and purple hues whisper of technology and sterile purpose, yet the emptiness echoes with absence. In the next space, the wall brimming with "R+D" hints at creativity and innovation, yet the darkened surroundings leave me feeling distant, and slightly melancholic. I am both observer and participant—aware of the potential for discovery, but haunted by an uneasy solitude.
